issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but the entire effect structure is wrong

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The effect returns cards FROM trash TO deck (reverse direction). Should use a custom action or SearchDeck-like behavior. Current action suggests discarding from hand to trash, which is backwards.

Condition 'TurnCount' with min:1 does not capture the '[Once Per Turn]' activation limit. Should use activation limit tracking, not TurnCount. TurnCount is for checking turn number, not per-turn ability usage.
Missing second effect: after returning cards, character becomes active and gains 'will not become active in next Refresh Phase' (a duration-based keyword/state that needs separate handling)
Filter is empty object {}. Should specify source:'Trash' and count:7 to return exactly 7 cards from trash.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may return 7 cards from your trash to the bottom of your deck in any order: Set this Character as active. Then, this Character will not become active in your next Refresh Phase.
